issues.description: Condition missing: effect should only trigger if this Character has 5000 power or more. Current condition is 'Always' but should check power threshold.

Action should specify that DON cards being attached must be rested DON cards (from the pool/in rest state), not just any DON cards. The mechanic of 'giving up to 2 rested DON cards' implies selecting from available rested DON cards.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [When Attacking] If this Character has 5000 power or more, give up to 2 rested DON!! cards to your Leader or 1 of your Characters.
